会让人有些不愉快吧……
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>不过幸好我现在身上有点食材，<unk[5:0]>
去用锅子做点料理吧！

在肚子餓的時候聽這些，
有點折磨人呢。
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>所幸我身上有點食材，<unk[5:0]>
就用鍋子做些料理吧！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>そこの<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿の<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話だけどさ…<unk[5:1]>
なんか <Ruby={4:8}りょうり>料理の<Ruby={4:6}わだい>話題が<Ruby={2:4}おお>多くないか？
<Ruby={2:4}はら>腹が<Ruby={2:2}へ>減ってる<Ruby={2:4}とき>時には
ちょっとした<Ruby={2:4}いや>嫌がらせだよな
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]><Ruby={2:6}さいわ>幸い <Ruby={2:4}いま>今のオレは<Ruby={4:10}しょくざい>食材を<Ruby={2:4}すこ>少し<Ruby={2:2}も>持ってるから<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}なべ>鍋を<Ruby={2:4}つか>使って <Ruby={4:8}りょうり>料理を<Ruby={2:4}つく>作っていこうかな！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>One thing that's odd here...<unk[5:1]> Everyone
keeps talking about cooking.

If I were hungry, I might think they were
rubbing all this food talk in my face.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>Not a problem though. I've got some
ingredients now. Maybe I'll use the
cooking pot and make some grub!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>那座驿站关于料理的话题特别多，

<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>あの<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿は <Ruby={4:8}りょうり>料理の<Ruby={4:6}わだい>話題が<Ruby={2:4}おお>多くて

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>All the talk of cooking here...it's making

Just ate. But I'll eat again, I guess.

rows.CNzh:
毕竟要是人倒下了，就什么都干不成了。<unk[5:1]>
靠料理养出一副好身子，才有调查的本钱。
rows.TWzh:
總之，萬一倒下就沒救了。<unk[5:1]>
所以靠料理強健身體，是調查的基本功喔。
rows.JPja:
ま <Ruby={2:4}たお>倒れちゃあ<Ruby={2:2}お>終わりだ<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={4:8}りょうり>料理で<Ruby={2:6}からだ>体づくりってのが <Ruby={4:8}ちょうさ>調査の<Ruby={4:6}きほん>基本だからな
rows.USen:
If I go into the field hungry, I might fall on
my face out there, and if that happens,
it's all over. Lights out.
You've gotta eat your three square a day.
That's investigation 101.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>不好意思，打扰一下……<unk[5:0]>

rows.TWzh: 沒見過
rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:2}み>見てない

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>就是<Color=red>深穴<Color=white>啊，很深很深的那个……<unk[5:0]>

我怎么就找不到呢？
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>难道是被什么东西掩盖住了？
还是说并没有传闻中的那么巨大……？
又或是我们现在身处的这个世界，
就是这<Color=red>深穴<Color=white>的底部……？
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>哈哈哈，这应该不可能吧！

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>很～深的<Color=red>深穴<Color=white>……<unk[5:0]>

<Ruby={2:2}き>聞いたことない？

<Ruby={2:2}み>見つからないって どういうことだ？

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>You know, a <Color=red>chasm<Color=white>—a deep, deep,
deep hole.<unk[5:0]> Haven't you heard about
those appearing?
These things are SO big, you can't see
bottom. But what's weird about this
chasm is...<unk[5:0]>I can't manage to find it at all.
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>Maybe it's hidden? Maybe chasms aren't
always big? Maybe some are small?

Or maybe...<unk[5:0]>our world up here is actually
BELOW whatever's down there. So up
here is really under all that.
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>Ha! Never mind. My mind kind of, er, fell
on its face there.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>这样啊……你没看到啊……<unk[5:0]>

勸我放棄呢。

ごめんごめん
<Ruby={2:6}あきら>諦めずに もう<Ruby={2:4}すこ>少し<Ruby={2:4}さが>探してみるかな…

Is that it? Guess I'm just taking advice

saying I should quit?
<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:12 78 111 116 105 99 101]>Oh. That's NOT what you meant? Sorry,

S'pose I'll keep on looking, then. Can't
give up yet.

<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>How goes it? Hmm?<PageBreak><unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:18 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83]>Ah! Don't tell me! Did you see...<unk[5:0]>maybe

<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>こんな<Ruby={2:4}あめ>雨でも <Ruby={4:6}だんさ>段差をよじ<Ruby={2:4}のぼ>登りそうな おまえ…<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>Young guy like you? Yeah, you're going
to climb slopes on a rainy day, even if
you might slip and fall to your ruin.
Just be careful, OK?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>光是在这辽阔的平原上漫步，
都能察觉到世界的种种变化啊……<unk[5:0]>
毕竟现在这个时代，天上都会掉遗迹下来了，<unk[5:1]>
一点小事已经无法令人吃惊了。
对了……<unk[5:0]><Color=red>东边<Color=white>的<Color=red>卡卡利科村<Color=white>里
似乎掉下了座别具一格的遗迹。
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>不过对我来说，别具一格可无法让我惊讶，
若是座别具三格的遗迹，我倒是会飞奔过去看看。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>光是走在這片遼闊的平原，
都能發現到世界的各種變化啊……<unk[5:0]>
畢竟現在可是有遺跡從天而降的時代，<unk[5:1]>

啊……<unk[5:0]>大家都在聊說
<Color=red>東邊<Color=white>的<Color=red>卡卡利科村<Color=white>墜落了一座有一些特別的遺跡。
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>不過到我這種程度的話，有一點特別才不算什麼，
若是有三些特別的遺跡，我就會飛奔過去看了。

まあ <Ruby={2:4}そら>空から<Ruby={4:6}いせき>遺跡が<Ruby={2:2}ふ>降るような<Ruby={4:6}じだい>時代だ<unk[5:1]>
ちょっとやそっとのことじゃ <Ruby={2:6}おどろ>驚かないけどな

<Ruby={4:8}さんぷう>三風<Ruby={2:2}か>変わった<Ruby={4:6}いせき>遺跡なら すっ<Ruby={2:2}と>飛んで<Ruby={2:2}み>見に<Ruby={2:2}い>行くけど
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Standing out in the open like this, you
really see how the world's changed.<unk[5:0]>

Not a lot of new stuff gets me all that
excited anymore. I mean, what can beat
RUINS just falling out of the SKY?
But...<unk[5:0]> A lot of ruins fell on <Color=red>Kakariko
Village <Color=white>to the <Color=red>east<Color=white>, and they say all
of them are unusual.
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>Still, unusual is totally usual now. Not
interested. Hey, if it was REALLY weird,
though, I'd be off to see it in a shot.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>有传闻说这边以<Color=red>东<Color=white>的<Color=red>卡卡利科村<Color=white>里

如果你有兴趣就去看看吧？<unk[5:0]>顺带一提，

<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>ここから<Color=red><Ruby={2:6}ひがし>東<Color=white>に<Ruby={2:2}い>行った <Color=red>カカリコ<Ruby={2:4}むら>村<Color=white>に

<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>They say that a number of unusual ruins
fell near <Color=red>Kakariko Village<Color=white>. That's <Color=red>east<Color=white>
from here.
Looks like the kind of thing that'd interest
you.<unk[5:0]> Who knows? If it's interesting
enough, I might head there too.

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>其实，我也在调查

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>Hmm? <unk[5:0]>What's going on?<unk[5:0]> You lose your
way out here maybe?<unk[5:0]>

You know <Color=red>Hyrule Castle<Color=white> to the <Color=red>north<Color=white>,
right?<unk[5:0]> Just short of that is a place called
<Color=red>Lookout Landing<Color=white>.
Lots of people and resources are
gathered there these days.<unk[5:1]> Head there
if you're trying to get your bearings.
<unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>You got all that? It's a pretty big deal.<unk[5:0]>
